inputs.text: Meri tabiyat kharab hai, bukhar hai aur thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai

inputs.text: Ab meri khaansi bhi shuru ho gayi hai, sookhi khaansi hai

hypotheses.rationale: The onset of dry cough increases the likelihood of bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever

inputs.text: Raat ko pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai, khaansi ab tak 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Night sweats, weight loss, and prolonged cough are cardinal signs of tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Although bronchitis can cause cough, the presence of night sweats and weight loss makes it less likely

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Pneumonia can present with similar symptoms, but the chronic nature of symptoms points more towards tuberculosis

inputs.text: Ab meri haalat aur bhi kharab ho gayi hai, bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, balgam mein khoon bhi aaya hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: The presence of blood in sputum and severe weakness confirms tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
